projects.name: Multi-Stage RAG Agent with FlowiseAI
projects.description: Designed a multi-stage pipeline with FlowiseAI and LangChain for a RAG system. Tested via FlowiseAI interface and locally to evaluate accuracy.

projects.name: Sentiment Analysis with TinyBERT & Logistic Regression
projects.description: Trained a sentiment classification model on 51,000 Kaggle samples, achieving 87% accuracy. Deployed a demo using Streamlit, supporting text and Reddit data input.

projects.name: Dental Clinic Management System
projects.description: Designed requirements, ERD, and system architecture. Implemented with MySQL and MongoDB using a microservices model.

projects.name: Recruitment and Fixed Asset Management Process with Odoo
projects.description: Configured Odoo modules (Recruitment, Employees, Surveys, Fixed Assets). Simulated recruitment and fixed asset management processes in class.
